mission.title: volcano: Added crd conversion.
mission.description:
Signed-off-by: Klaus Ma <klaus1982.cn@gmail.com>

fixed #595 

```release note
Add CRD conversion webhook to avoid version checking in different components.
```

resolution.summary: Is this the implementation of native k8s crd conversion? It means a client can get a resource(queue, podgroup, etc )of any version, and the conversion is auto done.
steps: Review the issue discussion for context
Apply the fix from the linked pull request
